title: fumaria skottsbergii
intro: Fumaria skottsbergii, also known as Icelandic fumitory or Skottsberg's fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the fumitory family, native to Iceland and Greenland. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Fumaria skottsbergii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
